profile.title: My Profile
profile.btn_ai_tour_generator: AI Pilgrimage Tour Course Auto Generator
profile.login_prompt:
Log in effortlessly
and get diverse coffee curations
profile.owner_add_shop_desc:
Register your cafe and let AI
match you with more customers.
profile.login_need_desc: Log in to permanently save your taste data.
profile.modal_welcome_desc: We will safely store your secret coffee tastes.
profile.verify_desc_req:
Enter your registered email address,
and we will send a verification code.
profile.reg_desc: Complete your personal curator with simple info.
profile.go_login: Already have an account? Log In
profile.find_id_desc: Enter the nickname you used during registration.
profile.find_pw_desc:
Enter your registered email address, 
and we will send a password reset link.
profile.reset_pw_desc:
Enter the verification code from your email
and your new password.
profile.confirm_photo_delete: Are you sure you want to delete your profile image?
profile.alert_pw_reset_sent: Password reset verification code has been sent to your email.
profile.err_code_pw_req: Please enter the verification code and a new password.
profile.alert_pw_reset_success: Password has been successfully reset. Please log in again.
profile.confirm_account_del: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All information (saved shops, reviews, profile, etc.) will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile.alert_account_del_error: An error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again later.
profile.err_google_fail: Failed to log in with Google.
profile.err_server: Failed to connect to the server
profile.err_email_pw_req: Please enter your email and password.
profile.err_verify_req: Email verification is required. Please enter the verification code.
profile.alert_code_sent: A verification code has been sent to your email.
profile.alert_new_code_sent: A new verification code has been sent.
profile.alert_charge_success: Test: 1000 Coffee Beans have been charged.
profile.alert_charge_fail: Failed to charge. Please try again.
profile.share_msg_default: This is my personal AI Coffee Prescription! ☕
profile.confirm_course_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this course? (Cannot be undone)
profile.ph_bio: I am a curator who loves coffee. (Max 100 chars)
profile.desc_enable_public_profile: Display your profile and collection to CoffeeTalk users.
profile.desc_empty_passport:
Move to specialty coffee spots on the map
and collect stamp authentications.
profile.desc_no_courses:
Create your unique coffee routes
or copy from other curators.
profile.desc_share_coffeetalk: Write a story or tasting note to share along with your prescription.
profile.alert_taste_saved: Your taste profile has been saved successfully!
profile.taste_desc: Your profile will be reflected in the community taste matching feed to help find specialty coffee that fits you best.
profile.ph_visit_memo: Leave a short memo about your visit to this store.
profile.password_policy: * At least 8 chars, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special symbols

curator.title: AI Curator
curator.intro_desc:
We analyze your vague tastes and current situation
to connect you with the optimal coffee.
curator.q_weather: How is the weather right now?
curator.opt_map_search_desc: If enabled, it takes about 10 extra seconds. Disable it if you want the fastest results.
curator.q_music: What music will you listen to while drinking?
curator.status_analyzing_desc:
Analyzing your coffee tastes and current mood,
to craft a one-of-a-kind prescription.
curator.status_desc: Finding the perfect coffee just for you.
curator.login_for_details: Log in to see detailed AI curation.
curator.view_more_map: View more nearby cafes on map
curator.try_again_desc: Would you like to get a new recommendation?
curator.save_modal_desc:
Feel free to name your prescription so it's easy to find later.
(e.g., Coffee I drink when I'm tired on a rainy morning)
curator.alert_login_req: Login required. Please login using [Profile] on the bottom menu bar!
curator.alert_save_success: Successfully saved to your AI coffee prescription history!
curator.alert_limit_reached:
You have exhausted all basic AI prescription limits.
(Current: {{current}} / {{limit}} uses)

Do you want to continue saving using 100 Coffee Beans (Points)?
curator.alert_no_points: You don't have enough Coffee Beans (Points). Please check your points in the profile menu.
